message: 🌱 Add flux: bootstrap: More details for `flux-system context deadline mission (#601)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "flux-4411-bootstrap-more-details-for-flux-system-context-deadline-exceeded",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "flux: bootstrap: More details for `flux-system context deadline exceeded` ",
+    "description": "bootstrap: More details for `flux-system context deadline exceeded` . Requested by 7+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current flux deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your flux version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux\nhelm list -n flux 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working flux installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review flux configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant flux configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux\nkubectl get configmap -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=flux\n```\n### Describe the bug\n\nGood day colleagues!\n\nPlease check the log below:\n\n```\nflux bootstrap gitlab --owner=gecube --repository=****** --path=mail-cluster --components-extra=\"image-reflector-controller,image-automation-controller\" \n► connecting to"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for bootstrap: More details for `flux-system context deadline",
+        "description": "This PR updates the bootstrap health checks to include GitRepository resource, return the  Ready condition message on timeout, and log the error at the end for better visibility.\r\n\nBefore (showing only relevant output:\n```\n✔ reconciled sync configuration\n◎ waiting for Kustomization\n```yaml\nflux bootstrap gitlab --owner=gecube --repository=****** --path=mail-cluster --components-extra=\"image-reflector-controller,image-automation-controller\" \n► connecting to https://gitlab.com\n► cloning branch \"main\" from Git repository \"https://gitlab.com/gecube/******.git\"\n✔ cloned repository\n► generating component manifests\n✔ generated component manifests\n✔ committed sync manifests to \"main\" (\"0bb95c27ed1f4b4c538d865877e647222d8c8af9\")\n► pushing component manifests to \"https://gitlab.com/gecube/******.git\"\n► installing components in \"flux-system\" namespace\n✔ installed components\n✔ reconciled co\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux\nkubectl get events -n flux --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"bootstrap: More details for `flux-system context deadline\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR updates the bootstrap health checks to include GitRepository resource, return the  Ready condition message on timeout, and log the error at the end for better visibility.\r\n\nBefore (showing only relevant output:\n```\n✔ reconciled sync configuration\n◎ waiting for Kustomization \"flux-system/flux-system\" to be reconciled\n✗ client rate limiter Wait returned an error: context deadline exceeded\n►",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "flux bootstrap gitlab --owner=gecube --repository=****** --path=mail-cluster --components-extra=\"image-reflector-controller,image-automation-controller\" \n► connecting to https://gitlab.com\n► cloning branch \"main\" from Git repository \"https://gitlab.com/gecube/******.git\"\n✔ cloned repository\n► generating component manifests\n✔ generated component manifests\n✔ committed sync manifests to \"main\" (\"0bb95c27ed1f4b4c538d865877e647222d8c8af9\")\n► pushing component manifests to \"https://gitlab.com/gecube/******.git\"\n► installing components in \"flux-system\" namespace\n✔ installed components\n✔ reconciled components\n► determining if source secret \"flux-system/flux-system\" exists\n► generating source secret\n✔ public key: ecdsa-sha2-nistp384 AAAAE2VjZHNhLXNoYTItbmlzdHAzODQAAAAIbmlzdHAzODQAAABhBH0A5BfvqdYEuj",
+        "kubectl get pods  -A\nNAMESPACE     NAME                                               READY   STATUS    RESTARTS   AGE\nkube-system   cilium-9kchm                                       1/1     Running   0          31m\nkube-system   cilium-operator-5f75d7d7ff-g7blj                   1/1     Running   0          31m\nkube-system   coredns-6b5b8ddb57-9p287                           1/1     Running   0          29m\nkube-system   coredns-6b5b8ddb57-pgbxd                           1/1     Running   0          29m\nkube-system   etcd-ubuntu-standard-4-8-60gb                      1/1     Running   2          32m\nkube-system   kube-apiserver-ubuntu-standard-4-8-60gb            1/1     Running   1          32m\nkube-system   kube-controller-manager-ubuntu-standard-4-8-60gb   1/1     Running   1         ",
+        "kubectl get pods -A\nNAMESPACE     NAME                                               READY   STATUS    RESTARTS   AGE\nflux-system   helm-controller-5f964c6579-pvkg2                   1/1     Running   0          16m\nflux-system   image-automation-controller-7764f8957c-l8pbh       1/1     Running   0          16m\nflux-system   image-reflector-controller-84c449dc57-xxn67        1/1     Running   0          16m\nflux-system   kustomize-controller-9c588946c-729r5               1/1     Running   0          16m\nflux-system   notification-controller-76dc5d768-vdmmn            1/1     Running   0          16m\nflux-system   source-controller-6c49485888-cthlh                 1/1     Running   0          16m\nkube-system   cilium-9kchm                                       1/1     Running   0          "
+      ]
+    }
+  },
